summary: DHH shares his excitement that the Omni Group has noticed and linked to his earlier blog posts suggesting creative uses for OmniOutliner, such as schedule and accounting management. He highlights a complimentary quote from an Omni team member and expresses anticipation for the upcoming version 3.0 with auto-filtering features.
key_points: Omni Group recognized DHH's outlining workflow suggestions for OmniOutliner
DHH had previously written about using OmniOutliner for scheduling and accounting
He expresses enthusiasm for the upcoming auto-filtering feature in version 3.0
money_quotes: I'm so proud that I even snapped a shot of it
Thanks for letting us link to your articles; very, very cool stuff you've got there.
key_insight: An early glimpse of DHH's passion for opinionated productivity tools and his engagement with software communities, years before Ruby on Rails.
